title: Starmer says UK won’t get ‘dragged into Iran war’ as Labour launches its local elections campaign – UK politics live
summary_full: UK PM to chair meeting on government’s response to economic consequences of Iran war later on MondayStarmer complained about other parties whipping up division, and he specifically criticised Nick Timothy, the shadow justice secretary, for “complaining about Muslims praying in public”.Labour, by contrast, values bringing people together, he said. Continue reading...
